theme: The real ROI of incentive travel — numbers HR directors need

linkedin.text:
HR directors always ask: "How do I justify the cost to the CFO?"

Here's what I tell them — with real numbers from our clients:

📊 The data:
→ Companies with structured incentive programs see 22% higher sales the year after
→ 96% of incentive travel participants report improved team cohesion
→ Turnover among trip participants: near zero for 12 months post-event
→ Average cost of replacing one mid-level employee: ₪80,000–150,000
→ Average cost of an incentive trip per person: ₪6,000–9,000

🧮 The math:
If a ₪200,000 trip prevents even 2 resignations — you've broken even. Everything else is profit.

Bonus ROI nobody talks about:
✓ Employer brand perception (candidates hear about it)
✓ Leadership trust scores increase
✓ Post-trip energy and productivity spike
✓ Stories that circulate internally for years

The question isn't "can we afford it?"
The question is "can we afford not to?"

📩 alon@upe.co.il

Alon Ouaknine

#IncentiveTravel #ROI #HRStrategy #EmployeeRetention #CorporateEvents #UproductionEvents #HRLeadership #TalentManagement
